case_title: TONY BENJAMIN HERNANDEZ VS. RAFAEL ANTONIO FUENTES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, TONY BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, RAFAEL ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION AS TO ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CREDITOR TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, TONY BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT FUENTES, RAFAEL ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, TONY BENJAMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUENTES, RAFAEL ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL $2,644.69 PRINCIPAL, $12.64 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,657.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
